name: Chickpea Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 Egg Whites (or 1/4 cup dry bread crumbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute scallions and mushrooms in oil until limp, about 5 minutes.
2. In a blender, combine garlic, chickpeas, and chickpea liquid. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer to a large bowl and combine with mushroom mixture.
4. Grind sunflower seeds in a blender or food processor to make a coarse meal. Add to chickpea mixture along with curry powder. Mix well.
5. Stir in egg whites or bread crumbs. Mixture will be soft.
6. On a large baking sheet or bread-board, shape the burger mixture into 8 patties and place on sesame seeds.
7. Flip to coat both sides generously.
8. Grill on a well-oiled vegetable grill for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until brown.
